title: olearia asterotricha subsp. asterotricha
intro: Olearia asterotricha subsp. asterotricha is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been traditionally used by the Indigenous Australians for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing sore throats. Olearia asterotricha subsp. asterotricha is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
